creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169894
patch from a git commit, apply with patch -p1

The recent release of node.js v6.0.0 has a clear message to users of 0.10.x and 0.12.x: it's time to upgrade. See https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v6.0.0/#what-about-node-js-v0-10-and-v0-12
    
The expiration dates are taken from the LTS schedule published by the node.js project, see https://github.com/nodejs/LTS#lts_schedule
